hyperedges.label: Brand carousel data-source migration (filesystem scan -> Brand table)
Formal quotation issuance and immutability lifecycle
Cross-change reuse of existing storage/audit pipelines instead of new abstractions
ARCO Customer Confirmation Flow
Content-Level Email Test Assurance
Shared Dependency on redesign-extensible-catalog-v2
Delta specs modified by the two-category taxonomy correction
Migration flow retiring Armazones and merging Lentes de sol ópticos
Two-layer compatibility engine: boolean capabilities + quoteOptions allowlist + fixed catalogs
Public touchpoints gated by HOME_VISIT_ENABLED
Admin/domain touchpoints explicitly preserved (not gated)
Docker Compose service startup/dependency chain
Docs jointly defining the reproducible local Docker dev environment
Three file variants of the same Pepi Visión 360 mockup
modules/* directories forming the modular-monolith architecture of Pepi Visión 360
docs/* analysis documents that cross-reference each other to describe design-reference/
Admin authentication, roles, and audit logging flow
Commercial request lifecycle governed by configurable retention
Shared requirement: every admin action logged to audit log

links.source_location: redesign-extensible-catalog-v2 SHALL be implemented only after add-pepi-vision-360-v1 is completed and archived
completamente independiente de la taxonomía de categorías
Bloque 5. Corrección de taxonomía a dos categorías
Bloque 7. Contenido de cristales y tratamientos
Tabla de trazabilidad — tareas 5.1-5.7 reabiertas en Bloque 8
Only SUPERADMIN may create or modify category structure / ADMIN may manage product offerings
Category images are administrable through an upload pipeline
Category is a data-driven entity, not a Prisma enum
installation migrating from the prior three-category taxonomy
Idempotent seed of the two definitive categories
Existing Armazones offerings are remapped to Lentes ópticos, not duplicated
Lentes de sol ópticos is renamed to Lentes de sol in place, not recreated
The migration does not remove or alter the legacy Product.priceFromClp field
A URL scoped to the removed Armazones category still resolves
Offering cards show category-appropriate information and CTA
Legacy product URLs redirect permanently to their category-scoped URL
Canonical URLs point to the category-scoped offering URL
The same product in two categories has two distinct titles
server re-resolves category/offering/product/color, never trusts client
The glass-type step uses the definitive terminology
Lens-type, treatment, and additional-option choices are scoped per category
Category-defined attributes are administrable without migration
Additional options are modeled separately from treatments
The lens-type catalog is exactly three values
"Multifocal" is not a valid lens-type value for new submissions
Each category declares a validated, server-enforced compatibility allowlist
Treatment copy never claims absolute scratch resistance
ProductOffering.configuration is scoped to non-filterable structured commercial options
ProductOffering.priceFromClp is the sole public source of truth for price
ProductOffering links a Product to a Category without duplication
using the definitive lens-configuration vocabulary (e.g. 'Progresivo', never 'Multifocal')
Fase 5 — evaluación contra la nueva taxonomía
CLOSED (reemplaza la tabla de tres categorías original)
CTA-label map currently hardcoded to the three old slugs including armazones
armazones no longer exists, default policy must change
ProductOffering.priceFromClp es la comercial source of truth
bounded, typed alternative to free-form EAV
extiende Category.capabilities con un bloque quoteOptions
igual que 'Capacidades vs. atributos' ... aquí también se evita un sistema EAV genérico
